dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Internals voted no_trade: XLK (tech, ~30% of SPY) is flat at +0.17% while only XLF leads at +0.55%, signaling sector divergence rather than broad risk-on — tech non-confirmation is the consensus's weakest link and a classic early-exhaustion warning at resistance.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Sector internals divergence (XLK flat while XLF rallies) contradicts the broad risk-on narrative; tech should lead a genuine gap-and-go, but it is not confirming, raising the probability that the +$2.21 gap exhausts into PMH resistance rather than breaks through it.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY fails to break above 710.92 PMH in the first RTH bar and XLK remains below +0.35% by 09:45 ET — gap exhausts into resistance, secondary bear case to 706.14 triggers quickly.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 709.91 (prior RTH high now support) and breaks above 710.92 PMH on the open with XLK confirmation

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks below PML 709.46 (gap-floor loss) with flat or declining XLK

invalidation.condition: SPY rejects PMH 710.92 in the first RTH bar AND XLK remains at or below +0.17% by 09:45 ET AND VIX holds above 19.00 — classic false-gap-into-resistance structure
invalidation.effect: Bullish consensus invalidated; primary scenario aborts, secondary bear case (706.14 target) activates. Rising VIX + tech non-confirmation flips the gap from accumulation to distribution signal.

swarm_predictions.claim: 712.39 (Carry battle level) is tested within the first 2 hours of RTH (by 11:30 ET), contingent on SPY breaking above 710.92 PMH at or shortly after the 09:30 open
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not trade at or above 712.00 by 11:30 ET — gap fails to extend beyond PMH resistance

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains in the 18.5–20.5 range through the first 90 minutes of RTH (09:30–11:00 ET), neither compressing to confirm full risk-on nor spiking to break the gap structure
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 18.5 (full risk-on confirmed) or spikes above 20.5 (gap structure breaks) by 11:00 ET

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY forms a higher low above the ribbon pivot (710.09) on its first RTH pullback, with the CLEAN_BULL ribbon spread maintaining above 60¢, confirming gap structure holds into the morning session
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY closes any 5-minute RTH bar below 710.09 within the first 60 minutes of RTH (ribbon pivot loss = bull structure broken)

synthesis_narrative: SPY gaps up +$2.21 into premarket high resistance at 710.92 with a CLEAN_BULL ribbon (86¢ spread), creating a gap-and-test structure where the opening bar decides whether buyers break through PMH toward the 712.39 Carry battle level or exhaust into a false-gap reversal. Three of four specialists vote bullish at a weighted score of 0.90, but the validator correctly flags rising VIX (+1.22% to 19.13) and flat XLK (+0.17%) as countervailing signals — in a genuine risk-on gap, tech leads and volatility compresses, and neither is happening premarket. The single most important watch at the open is the PMH 710.92 break with XLK confirmation: a decisive break targets 712.39 (~$1.50 upside); a PMH rejection with flat tech and VIX holding above 19 triggers the secondary bear case toward 706.14.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BULL ribbon 86¢ spread, last 3 bars progressively green, strong full-body 5:55 close at 710.90 — cleanest bullish premarket structure

macro.one_line: VIX 19.13 MID regime rising modestly, zero macro events today, overnight gap +$2.21 risk-on with mixed sectors (XLF up, XLK flat)

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 712.39 (Carry resistance) is 1.49 handles above; price sandwiched PMH 710.92 / PML 709.46, BULL ribbon tilts conviction upside contingent on PMH break

internals.one_line: XLK flat +0.17% with only XLF leading at +0.55% — single-sector breadth without tech confirmation = mixed/flat rotation, insufficient directional internals signal

validator.top_invalidation: Rising VIX + flat XLK + price AT (not above) PMH resistance = potential false-gap exhaustion; bull case requires XLK >+0.35% and PMH break in first RTH bar
